name: Geochemical Composition of Manganese Nodules from Event PLDS04MV-109BX in the Pacific Ocean
description: Geochemical data for manganese nodules collected at a single deep-sea location (11.072°N, -140.047°W, -4722m elevation) on August 27, 1976. The dataset includes major and trace element concentrations (Al, Si, Ca, Mn, Fe, Co, Ni, Cu, Zn, Ba, Sc, Sb, and rare earth elements) measured from the topside of a smooth nodule sample, along with spatial coordinates, sample ID, and deposit type.
